mapper.insert: INSERT INTO es_sync_failure (entity_type, entity_id, operation, status, retry_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{operation}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM es_sync_failure ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM es_sync_failure WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
